Looking at the image, the blocks are at rows 40-44, cols 34-38. The top indicator is at rows 10-14, cols 34-38. The blocks are still far from the top indicator.
Let me continue moving UP to reach the top indicator. The blocks need to move UP by about 26 more rows to reach rows 14-18.

Let me try moving UP more and see what happens. If the blocks get stuck again, I'll need to rethink my approach.
Actually, I just realized something. The blocks are at rows 40-44, which is in the vertical passage. The top indicator is at rows 10-14. The blocks need to move UP by about 26 more rows to reach the top indicator.
But the vertical passage is only about 30 rows tall (from rows 14 to 44). So the blocks can move UP by about 26 rows to reach the top indicator.
Let me try moving UP by 26 rows and see what happens.

Let me check the ascii for the vertical passage layout.

action(['UP'] * 25)
